nasb.text: “You shall not profane My holy name, but I will be sanctified among the sons of Israel; I am the Lord who sanctifies you,

esv.text: And you shall not profane my holy name, that I may be sanctified among the people of Israel. I am the Lord who sanctifies you,

cnv.text: 你們不可褻瀆我的聖名，我在以色列人中間要被尊為聖；我是使你們分別為聖的耶和華，

ccb.text: 不可亵渎我的圣名，我要在以色列人中彰显我的圣洁，我是使你们圣洁的耶和华。
